turns.source_text: I'm ashamed it took me a while to get it
turns.user_message: I'm embarrassed that something so simple took me this long. I feel like I should be better at this by now.
I keep second-guessing everything I do at work because I'm sure I'm getting it wrong. It's like I can't trust my own judgment.
I honestly don't know how I still have my job because I mess up constantly. I feel like everyone's just waiting for me to fail.
